title: <div>- ✅ Complete **every Weekly Discussion and Close Reading Assignment** from
content:
- ✅ Complete **every Weekly Discussion and Close Reading Assignment** from Weeks 4-13.
- ✅ If you **successfully complete** all these assignments, you will be **excused** from:
- **Research Paper - First Draft & Peer Reviews**
- **Research Paper - Final Draft**

### **Option 2: Research Track**
- ✅ Each week in Weeks 4-13, you may **choose** to complete **either** the Weekly Discussion **or** the Close Reading Assignment.
- ✅ If you select this option, you must complete **all** of the research writing assignments in **Weeks 14-15**, including:
- **Research Essay Proposal**
- **Annotated Bibliography**
- **Research Paper - First Draft & Peer Reviews**
- **Research Paper - Final Draft**

### **Important Notes:**
⚠ **Once you choose an option, you must stick with it.** Switching back and forth is **not allowed**.
⚠ **If you opt for Option 1**, all Discussions and Close Readings must be completed **fully and on time**.
⚠ **If you opt for Option 2**, you must plan ahead to complete all required research assignments in **Weeks 14-15**.
